fields.helpText: This field contains the number associated with the reasons listed in the 'RAD/NUC MED REASON' file (#75.2).
This field contains the allowable reasons a user may choose from when placing an order in the category of 'HOLD' or 'CANCELLED'.

This field contains internally stored code. '1' will stand for 'Cancel Request'. '3' will stand for 'Hold Request'. '9' will stand for 'General Request'.  A type code must be assigned to a reason in order to make it selectable by users.

This field may contain a synonym (2-15 characters) for the reason. It is recommended that frequently used reasons be given at least one synonym to allow the reason to be called up rapidly, resulting in   processing time to be saved.

The Nature of Order Activity determines actions that OE/RR will take when it is notified that an order was held or canceled by the imaging service. The Nature of Order Activity you enter here may trigger or suppress OE/RR printing of a chart copy of the hold or cancel order.  It may also trigger or suppress OE/RR alerting the original requesting physician that his/her electronic signature is needed.  The master file of Nature of Order Activities resides within the OE/RR software and may be confi
Flag to indicate a standardized entry provided by national. If this flag is set, the entry cannot be modified.
